nmaprun.args: /usr/lib/nmap/nmap -vv --reason -Pn -T4 -sV -p 80 "--script=banner,(http* or ssl*) and not (brute or broadcast or dos or external or http-slowloris* or fuzzer)" -oN /home/rf2i/Documents/HTB/Machines/Forgotten/results/10.129.234.81/scans/tcp80/tcp_80_http_nmap.txt -oX /home/rf2i/Documents/HTB/Machines/Forgotten/results/10.129.234.81/scans/tcp80/xml/tcp_80_http_nmap.xml 10.129.234.81
